questions.question: Which city hosted the 2024 Summer Olympic Games?
questions.explanation: The 2024 Summer Olympics were held in Paris, France.

questions.question: Which country topped the medal count at the 2024 Paris Olympics?
questions.explanation: The USA topped the overall medal count at the 2024 Olympics.

questions.question: Who survived an assassination attempt at a rally in Pennsylvania in July 2024?
questions.explanation: Trump was shot in the ear at a rally in Butler, PA on July 13, 2024.

questions.question: Which US president dropped out of the 2024 presidential race in July?
questions.explanation: President Biden announced on July 21, 2024 that he would not seek re-election.

questions.question: Who replaced Biden as the Democratic presidential nominee?
questions.explanation: Vice President Kamala Harris became the Democratic nominee.

questions.question: Which tech company faced a massive global outage in July 2024 due to a faulty software update?
questions.explanation: A faulty CrowdStrike update caused a global IT outage on July 19, affecting millions.

questions.question: Who won the UEFA Euro 2024 tournament?
questions.explanation: Spain defeated England 2-1 in the Euro 2024 final in Berlin.

questions.question: Which South American country won the 2024 Copa América?
questions.explanation: Argentina defeated Colombia 1-0 in the Copa América final.

questions.question: Who did Kamala Harris choose as her VP running mate?
questions.explanation: Harris chose Minnesota Governor Tim Walz as her running mate in August 2024.

questions.question: Which messaging app founder was arrested in France in August 2024?
questions.explanation: Telegram founder Pavel Durov was arrested at a Paris airport in August 2024.

questions.question: Which country launched a major ground invasion into Lebanon in September 2024?
questions.explanation: Israel launched a ground operation in southern Lebanon targeting Hezbollah.

questions.question: What unprecedented attack targeted Hezbollah members via everyday devices in September 2024?
questions.explanation: Thousands of pagers and walkie-talkies used by Hezbollah exploded in Lebanon.

questions.question: Which AI company raised $6.6 billion in September 2024, its largest funding round?
questions.explanation: OpenAI raised $6.6 billion at a $157 billion valuation in September 2024.

questions.question: Which swimmer became the most decorated Olympian at Paris 2024?
questions.explanation: Michael Phelps remains the most decorated Olympian; no one broke his record at Paris 2024.

questions.question: Which major hurricane devastated parts of the southeastern US in September 2024?
questions.explanation: Hurricane Helene caused catastrophic flooding in the Southeast US in late September 2024.
